# <your-website> Blog

> My app is a scheduling app called <your-website> that helps freelancers and small businesses manage clients and appointments

This blog publishes content about scheduling, client management, and business productivity tools for freelancers and small businesses — from introductory concepts through comparisons and tool reviews. All content is SEO-optimized and organized by funnel stage (top, middle, and bottom).

## Sections

- / — all articles
- /[slug] — individual article

## Useful links

- Website: https://<your-website>.app
- Sitemap: https://<your-website>.app/sitemap.xml
